name: GC
summary: Garbage Collection: tự động reclaim unreachable memory. Tránh memory leak/use-after-free nhưng có overhead.

facts.text: tracing GC: mark reachable objects, sweep unreachable
reference counting: Python, Swift — không handle cycles
generational: young gen (short-lived) collected thường xuyên
Go concurrent GC: pause < 1ms thường. Tunable với GOGC

danger: reference cycles: ref counting không handle
